name: Code Reviewer
description: An agent that reviews Python code for bugs, security issues, and style violations. It receives a code snippet and returns a structured list of findings with severity levels.
benchmark_queries: Review this code for SQL injection
Find race conditions in this async function
Check this class for SOLID violations

name: SQL Query Optimizer
description: An agent that analyzes slow SQL queries and suggests optimizations including index creation, query rewriting, and schema changes. Receives a SQL query and execution plan, returns optimized version.
benchmark_queries: This subquery is slow, suggest alternative
Add indexes for this WHERE clause pattern

name: API Documentation Generator
description: An agent that generates OpenAPI/Swagger documentation from source code. Receives a Python file with FastAPI/Flask routes and produces complete API documentation with examples.

input_schema.description: Python source file with API routes

benchmark_queries: Generate docs for this FastAPI app
Document all endpoints with request/response examples
Add authentication headers to the OpenAPI spec
